task_completion.visual_evidence: The ReqView application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Load the Example Project in ReqView
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Example Project is loaded in ReqView, visible in the project tree or window title.

task_completion.description: Open the SRS document to view requirements
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SRS' (Software Requirements Specification) document is open in the main view, displaying requirement IDs.

task_completion.description: Identify requirements lacking traceability links to tests
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is examining the traceability or links column in the SRS document, filtering for missing links, or highlighting untested requirements (e.g., SRS-32, SRS-36).

task_completion.description: Save the list of untested requirement IDs to the specified text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal is visible showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/untested_requirements.txt' containing a list of SRS IDs (e.g., SRS-32, SRS-36, SRS-101) with one per line and no section headings.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ReqView GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating the ReqView application interface rather than solely parsing JSON files via terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The output file strictly follows the requested format
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file contains only the requirement IDs (e.g., 'SRS-32') with one per line, without any additional text, bullet points, or section headings.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely identified the untested requirements
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent scrolled through or filtered the SRS document to find missing links, rather than magically pasting a pre-computed list of IDs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: There are 110 untested requirements in the SRS document. Examples of untested requirements include SRS-32, SRS-36, SRS-101, and SRS-102. The output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/untested_requirements.txt'.
